task-001.description: Create auth types and IAuthService interface
acceptanceCriteria: IAuthService interface exports signIn, signUp, signOut, getSession, refreshSession, onAuthStateChange methods
AuthUser type has id, email, emailVerified, provider, displayName, avatarUrl fields
AuthSession type has id, userId, expiresAt, refreshedAt fields (no token fields)
AuthResult type wraps user + session with optional error
All methods return Promises; getSession returns null if not authenticated
MockAuthService implements IAuthService interface
In-memory user/session storage with Map
signUp creates user and returns session
signIn validates credentials and returns session or error
signOut clears current session
getSession returns current session or null
onAuthStateChange accepts callback and returns unsubscribe function
reset() method clears all state for test isolation
SupabaseAuthService implements IAuthService interface
Constructor accepts supabaseUrl and supabaseAnonKey parameters
Uses @supabase/supabase-js createClient internally
signIn calls supabase.auth.signInWithPassword
signUp calls supabase.auth.signUp
signOut calls supabase.auth.signOut
getSession calls supabase.auth.getSession
onAuthStateChange wraps supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange
Maps Supabase User/Session types to domain AuthUser/AuthSession types
IEnvironment.services includes optional auth?: IAuthService
Existing code continues to work (auth is optional)
Type exports updated in environment/index.ts
AuthStateMixin is a types.model() composable with actions
initialize() action checks session on mount via env.services.auth.getSession()
syncFromSupabase(user, session) action updates local AuthUser/AuthSession/AuthState entities
signIn(email, password) action sets isLoading, calls service, syncs result
signUp(email, password) action sets isLoading, calls service, handles verification flow
signOut() action calls service.signOut(), clears local state
setupAuthSubscription() action subscribes to onAuthStateChange, returns cleanup
All actions access auth service via getEnv<IEnvironment>(self).services.auth
Error handling sets AuthState.error and AuthState.errorCode
createAuthEnhancementHooks() returns { enhanceModels, enhanceCollections, enhanceRootStore }
enhanceModels adds AuthSession.isExpired computed view (compares expiresAt to now)
enhanceModels adds AuthUser.isVerified computed view (emailVerified || phoneVerified)
enhanceCollections adds authStateCollection.current getter for singleton access
enhanceRootStore composes AuthStateMixin into root store
enhanceRootStore adds isAuthenticated view (status === 'authenticated')
enhanceRootStore adds currentUser view (returns user from AuthState or null)
packages/state-api/src/auth/index.ts exports all public types and functions
Exports: IAuthService, AuthUser, AuthSession, AuthResult, AuthState types
Exports: SupabaseAuthService, MockAuthService classes
Exports: AuthStateMixin, createAuthEnhancementHooks
AuthProvider component creates auth store with SupabaseAuthService from env vars
AuthProvider initializes auth on mount (calls store.initialize())
AuthProvider sets up auth subscription with cleanup in useEffect
useAuth() hook returns { user, session, status, isLoading, error, signIn, signUp, signOut }
useAuth() throws if used outside AuthProvider
Components using useAuth re-render on auth state changes (observer pattern)
LoginForm has email and password input fields
Submit button calls signIn from useAuth()
Loading state disables form and shows indicator
Error message displayed when signIn fails
Success triggers onSuccess callback prop
Follows existing inline style patterns from codebase
SignupForm has email, password, confirmPassword input fields
Password confirmation validation before submit
Submit button calls signUp from useAuth()
Loading state disables form and shows indicator
Error message displayed when signUp fails
Success shows email verification message
Follows existing inline style patterns from codebase
ProtectedRoute wraps children and checks isAuthenticated from useAuth()
Redirects to /login if not authenticated (uses Navigate from react-router)
Shows loading indicator while auth is initializing
Renders children when authenticated
Preserves intended destination for redirect after login
UserMenu displays current user email or displayName from useAuth()
Shows user avatar if avatarUrl available
Logout button calls signOut from useAuth()
Shows loading state during signOut
Follows existing inline style patterns from codebase
LoginPage renders LoginForm centered on page
LoginPage redirects to / on successful login
LoginPage has link to /signup for new users
SignupPage renders SignupForm centered on page
SignupPage has link to /login for existing users
App wrapped with AuthProvider at root level
Routes /login and /signup added with LoginPage and SignupPage
Protected routes (unit1, unit2, unit3) wrapped with ProtectedRoute
Navigation shows UserMenu when authenticated, login link when not
HomePage remains public (no ProtectedRoute)
Tests for MockAuthService: signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange
Tests verify correct user/session creation
Tests verify error handling for invalid credentials
Tests verify onAuthStateChange callback receives events
Tests use beforeEach reset for isolation
All tests pass with bun test
Tests use MockAuthService injected via environment
Tests for initialize(): sets isInitialized, syncs existing session
Tests for signIn(): sets isLoading, updates state on success, handles error
Tests for signUp(): sets isLoading, updates state on success, handles error
Tests for signOut(): clears user/session, sets status to unauthenticated
Tests verify AuthState singleton access pattern
All tests pass with bun test
